---
title: bdd [simple-vehicle.sysml]
---
classDiagram
    class VehicleModel {
        <<package>>
    }
    class MassValue {
        <<attribute def>>
    }
    class SpeedValue {
        <<attribute def>>
    }
    class VolumeValue {
        <<attribute def>>
    }
    class FuelPort {
        <<port def>>
        +item fuelIn : FuelType
    }
    class ElectricalPort {
        <<port def>>
        +item powerIn : ScalarValues::Real
        +item powerOut : ScalarValues::Real
    }
    class PowerSource {
        <<part def>>
        +modifier abstract
        +attribute maxPower : ScalarValues::Real
    }
    class Engine {
        <<part def>>
        +port fuelIn : FuelPort
        +attribute displacement : VolumeValue
        +attribute fuelType : FuelType
    }
    class ElectricMotor {
        <<part def>>
        +port electricIn : ElectricalPort
        +attribute efficiency : ScalarValues::Real
    }
    class Transmission {
        <<part def>>
        +attribute gearCount : ScalarValues::Integer
        +attribute isAutomatic : ScalarValues::Boolean
    }
    class Wheel {
        <<part def>>
        +attribute diameter : ISQ::LengthValue
    }
    class Chassis {
        <<part def>>
        +attribute mass : MassValue
    }
    class Vehicle {
        <<part def>>
        +attribute mass : MassValue
        +attribute topSpeed : SpeedValue
        +part engine : Engine
        +part transmission : Transmission
        +part wheel : Wheel [4]
        +part chassis : Chassis
        +connection engineToTrans : EngineConnection
    }
    class EngineConnection {
        <<connection def>>
    }
    class StartEngine {
        <<action def>>
        +feature ignitionSignal : ScalarValues::Boolean
        +feature engineRunning : ScalarValues::Boolean
    }
    class Accelerate {
        <<action def>>
        +feature throttle : ScalarValues::Real
        +feature speed : SpeedValue
    }
    class Brake {
        <<action def>>
        +feature brakeForce : ScalarValues::Real
        +feature speed : SpeedValue
    }
    class Drive {
        <<action def>>
        +action start : StartEngine
        +action accelerate : Accelerate
        +action brake : Brake
    }
    class EngineStates {
        <<state def>>
        +state off : ?
        +state starting : ?
        +state running : ?
        +state stopping : ?
    }
    class VehicleMassReq {
        <<requirement def>>
    }
    class TopSpeedReq {
        <<requirement def>>
    }
    class MassConstraint {
        <<constraint def>>
        +feature massActual : MassValue
        +feature massLimit : MassValue
    }
    class DriveVehicle {
        <<use case def>>
    }
    class VehicleStructureView {
        <<view def>>
    }
    MassValue <|-- MassValue
    SpeedValue <|-- SpeedValue
    VolumeValue <|-- VolumeValue
    PowerSource <|-- Engine
    PowerSource <|-- ElectricMotor
    Engine *-- Vehicle : engine
    Transmission *-- Vehicle : transmission
    Wheel *-- Vehicle : wheel
    Chassis *-- Vehicle : chassis
